audit_items.proof_trace: The gossip path validates index < NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS via verify_data_column_sidecar (peerdas_helpers.nim:356), but the sync path (request_manager.nim:190, validator_custody.nim:168) only calls verify_data_column_sidecar_inclusion_proof, which omits index validation. Sidecars from sync are put directly into ColumnQuarantine, triggering out-of-bounds array access at getIndex (blob_quarantine.nim:237) when indexMap[int(index)] is accessed with index >= 128.
audit_items.attack_scenario: A malicious peer serving sync requests can send data column sidecars with index >= 128. When the node processes these via checkColumnResponse and puts them in ColumnQuarantine, the getIndex function performs an unchecked array access to indexMap[index], causing a crash or memory corruption since indexMap is only sized to NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS (128).
